notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan singles on a line drive to left fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Angel Martínez scores. Brayan Rocchio to 3rd. Steven Kwan to 2nd. Fielding error by left fielder Mike Yastrzemski.

notableEvents.label: David Fry pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: David Fry walks. Rhys Hoskins to 3rd. Juan Brito to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Austin Riley singles on a line drive to left fielder Angel Martínez. Drake Baldwin scores. Austin Riley to 2nd. Austin Riley advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by left fielder Angel Martínez.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Austin Riley singles on a line drive to left fielder Angel Martínez. Drake Baldwin scores. Austin Riley to 2nd. Austin Riley advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by left fielder Angel Martínez.

notableEvents.label: Chase DeLauter GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Chase DeLauter grounds into a double play, first baseman Matt Olson to shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson. Steven Kwan out at 2nd. Chase DeLauter out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Drake Baldwin grounds into a double play, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Ronald Acuña Jr. out at 2nd. Drake Baldwin out at 1st.
